diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_bridge_broadway_qualification.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_bridge_broadway_qualification.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4d63a4d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_bridge_broadway_qualification.py
@@ -0,0 +1,109 @@
+"""Bridge / Broadway portfolio — qualification engine regression."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+from types import SimpleNamespace
+
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.context import QualificationContext
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.engine import run_qualification_engine
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.facts import resolve_liquid_assets
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.lender_match import product_matches_application_loan_type
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.required_docs import missing_required_documents
+from agent.services.loanproducts.models import LoanProductCriteria
+
+
+def _product(name: str, category: str) -> SimpleNamespace:
+    return SimpleNamespace(
+        id=f"id-{name}",
+        name=name,
+        category=category,
+        min_amount=25_000,
+        max_amount=5_000_000,
+        typical_rate_range=SimpleNamespace(min=7.0, max=12.0),
+        typical_term_months=SimpleNamespace(min=12, max=60),
+        criteria=LoanProductCriteria(
+            min_credit_score=650,
+            min_dscr=1.15,
+            min_years_in_business=1.0,
+            min_annual_revenue=150_000,
+            collateral_required=False,
+        ),
+    )
+
+
+class TestBridgeBroadwayQualification(unittest.TestCase):
+    def _bridge_facts(self) -> dict:
+        return {
+            "as_is_value": 1_700_000,
+            "total_as_is_value": 3_800_000,
+            "portfolio_property_count": 2,
+            "primary_fico_score": 665,
+            "bureau_fico_scores": {"experian": 665},
+            "total_assets": 14_801_705,
+            "total_liabilities": 6_939_211,
+            "net_worth": 7_862_494,
+            "liquid_assets": 14_801_705,  # bad merge — should be ignored
+            "pfs_cash": 615_287,
+            "marketable_securities": 43_705,
+            "portfolio_total_revenue": 380_441,
+            "portfolio_net_income": 258_742,
+            "gross_potential_rent": 166_212,
+            "operating_expenses": 121_699,
+            "noi": 35_385,
+            "annual_debt_service": 101_100,
+            "schedule_e_income": 175_425,
+            "property_state": "MA",
+            "hud_loan_amount": 202,  # bad OCR — should not drive cross-check
+        }
+
+    def test_liquid_assets_rejects_total_assets_mistake(self):
+        liquid, _ = resolve_liquid_assets(self._bridge_facts())
+        self.assertEqual(liquid, 615_287.0)
+
+    def test_term_construction_does_not_require_ctc_docs(self):
+        missing = missing_required_documents(
+            "term",
+            "Construction",
+            {"property_appraisal", "credit_report", "personal_financial_statement", "pl_statement"},
+            facts=self._bridge_facts(),
+        )
+        self.assertNotIn("construction_budget", missing)
+        self.assertNotIn("cost_to_complete", missing)
+
+    def test_term_construction_matches_only_term_product(self):
+        term = _product("Business Term Loan", "Conventional")
+        cre = _product("Commercial Real Estate Loan", "Real Estate")
+        self.assertTrue(product_matches_application_loan_type(term, "term", "Construction")[0])
+        self.assertFalse(product_matches_application_loan_type(cre, "term", "Construction")[0])
+
+    def test_bridge_application_product_fit(self):
+        ctx = QualificationContext(
+            application_id="6a420b69643c7f6219508247",
+            user_id="user-bb",
+            lender_id="lender-bb",
+            loan_amount=70_000,
+            loan_type="term",
+            loan_purpose="Construction",
+            business={"name": "GK Infosec", "state": "MA", "yearEstablished": 2010},
+            owner={},
+            financials={},
+            facts=self._bridge_facts(),
+            loan_products=[
+                _product("Business Term Loan", "Conventional"),
+                _product("SBA 7(a) Standard", "SBA"),
+                _product("Commercial Real Estate Loan", "Real Estate"),
+            ],
+            live_mode=False,
+        )
+        result = run_qualification_engine(ctx)
+        names = {p.product_name for p in result.product_fit}
+        self.assertEqual(names, {"Business Term Loan"})
+        term = result.product_fit[0]
+        dscr_gaps = [g for g in term.gaps if "DSCR" in g]
+        self.assertTrue(dscr_gaps)
+        self.assertFalse(any("DSCR 0.0" in g for g in term.gaps))
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_cre_field_extraction.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_cre_field_extraction.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0332cd2
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_cre_field_extraction.py
@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+"""Tests for CRE field extraction."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+
+from agent.documents.extractors.cre_fields import (
+    extract_appraisal_fields,
+    extract_hud_fields,
+    extract_rent_roll_fields,
+    extract_t12_fields,
+)
+
+
+class TestCreFieldExtraction(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_appraisal_extracts_as_is_value(self):
+        text = "As-Is Value: $1,250,000\nMarket conditions stable."
+        facts = extract_appraisal_fields(text)
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("as_is_value"), 1_250_000.0)
+
+    def test_rent_roll_occupancy(self):
+        text = "Total Units: 20\nOccupied: 18\nGross Potential Rent: $240,000"
+        facts = extract_rent_roll_fields(text)
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("total_units"), 20)
+        self.assertAlmostEqual(float(facts.get("physical_occupancy", 0)), 0.9, places=2)
+
+    def test_t12_noi(self):
+        text = "Effective Gross Income $500,000\nOperating Expenses $200,000\nNOI $300,000"
+        facts = extract_t12_fields(text)
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("noi"), 300_000.0)
+
+    def test_hud_loan_amount(self):
+        text = "Loan Amount: $800,000\nPurchase Price: $1,000,000"
+        facts = extract_hud_fields(text)
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("hud_loan_amount"), 800_000.0)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_cre_qualification.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_cre_qualification.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..2e3b63f
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_cre_qualification.py
@@ -0,0 +1,141 @@
+"""Unit tests for CRE qualification engine (deterministic, no DB)."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.context import DocumentMeta, QualificationContext
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.cross_checks import run_all_cross_checks
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.engine import run_qualification_engine
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.recommendation import resolve_recommendation
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.scoring import weighted_score
+
+
+class TestCreQualificationScoring(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_weighted_score_renormalizes_missing_components(self):
+        weights = {"a": 0.5, "b": 0.5}
+        score = weighted_score({"a": 80.0, "b": None}, weights)
+        self.assertEqual(score, 80.0)
+
+    def test_minimal_context_returns_response(self):
+        ctx = QualificationContext(
+            application_id="app-1",
+            user_id="user-1",
+            lender_id="lender-1",
+            loan_amount=500_000,
+            loan_type="Commercial Real Estate",
+            loan_purpose="Acquisition",
+            business={"name": "Test LLC"},
+            owner={},
+            financials={},
+            documents=[],
+            facts={"appraisal_sale_price": 800_000},
+            live_mode=False,
+        )
+        result = run_qualification_engine(ctx)
+        self.assertEqual(result.application_id, "app-1")
+        self.assertIsInstance(result.intelligence_heads, list)
+        self.assertGreaterEqual(len(result.intelligence_heads), 5)
+        # Sparse deals may reach partial coverage with market/structure proxies
+        self.assertIsNotNone(result.overall.confidence_score)
+
+    def test_liquidity_ratio_when_pfs_and_loan(self):
+        ctx = QualificationContext(
+            application_id="app-2",
+            user_id="user-2",
+            lender_id="lender-2",
+            loan_amount=1_000_000,
+            loan_type="Term Loan",
+            loan_purpose="Working Capital",
+            business={},
+            owner={},
+            financials={},
+            facts={"pfs_line_items": {"cash": 150_000, "marketable securities": 50_000}},
+            live_mode=False,
+        )
+        result = run_qualification_engine(ctx)
+        sponsor = next(h for h in result.intelligence_heads if h.id == "sponsor")
+        liquidity_vars = sponsor.categories.get("Liquidity", [])
+        ratio_var = next((v for v in liquidity_vars if v.key == "liquidity_ratio"), None)
+        self.assertIsNotNone(ratio_var)
+        self.assertEqual(ratio_var.status, "computed")
+        self.assertAlmostEqual(float(ratio_var.value), 0.2, places=3)
+
+    def test_application_scoped_documents_only_in_readiness(self):
+        ctx = QualificationContext(
+            application_id="app-3",
+            user_id="user-3",
+            lender_id="lender-3",
+            loan_amount=250_000,
+            loan_type="SBA",
+            loan_purpose="",
+            business={},
+            owner={},
+            financials={},
+            document_ids=["doc-a"],
+            documents=[
+                DocumentMeta(
+                    document_id="doc-a",
+                    document_type="bank_statement",
+                    filename="stmt.pdf",
+                    ingestion_status="ready",
+                )
+            ],
+            live_mode=False,
+        )
+        result = run_qualification_engine(ctx)
+        self.assertEqual(result.readiness.documents_total, 1)
+        self.assertEqual(result.readiness.documents_ready, 1)
+
+    def test_rich_cre_context_enables_deal_score_and_cross_checks(self):
+        facts = {
+            "as_is_value": 2_000_000,
+            "noi": 180_000,
+            "gross_potential_rent": 220_000,
+            "operating_expenses": 40_000,
+            "physical_occupancy": 0.92,
+            "total_units": 24,
+            "hud_loan_amount": 1_200_000,
+            "annual_debt_service": 96_000,
+            "liquid_assets": 400_000,
+            "net_worth": 1_500_000,
+            "fico_score": 720,
+        }
+        ctx = QualificationContext(
+            application_id="app-cre",
+            user_id="user-cre",
+            lender_id="lender-cre",
+            loan_amount=1_200_000,
+            loan_type="Commercial Real Estate",
+            loan_purpose="Acquisition",
+            business={"name": "CRE LLC", "state": "CA", "yearEstablished": 2010},
+            owner={"creditScore": 720},
+            financials={},
+            document_ids=["doc-appraisal", "doc-t12", "doc-hud"],
+            documents=[
+                DocumentMeta("doc-appraisal", "property_appraisal", "appraisal.pdf", "ready"),
+                DocumentMeta("doc-t12", "t12_operating_statement", "t12.pdf", "ready"),
+                DocumentMeta("doc-hud", "hud_settlement", "hud.pdf", "ready"),
+            ],
+            facts=facts,
+            live_mode=False,
+        )
+        result = run_qualification_engine(ctx)
+        self.assertTrue(result.overall.deal_score_available)
+        self.assertGreater(result.overall.deal_score, 0)
+        self.assertEqual(
+            result.overall.recommendation_band,
+            resolve_recommendation(
+                deal_score=result.overall.deal_score,
+                deal_score_available=True,
+            ).band,
+        )
+        self.assertGreater(len(result.cross_checks), 0)
+        checks, _confidence = run_all_cross_checks(ctx, {"noi": 180_000, "appraised_value": 2_000_000})
+        self.assertGreater(len(checks), 0)
+        self.assertTrue(result.recommended_terms)
+        self.assertIn("max_loan_amount", result.recommended_terms)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_lender_product_match.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_lender_product_match.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..bd3cb7e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_lender_product_match.py
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+"""Lender product vs application loan type matching."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+from types import SimpleNamespace
+
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.lender_match import (
+    format_application_loan_type,
+    product_matches_application_loan_type,
+)
+
+
+def _product(name: str, category: str) -> SimpleNamespace:
+    return SimpleNamespace(name=name, category=category)
+
+
+class TestLenderProductMatch(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_format_term_loan_type(self):
+        self.assertEqual(format_application_loan_type("term"), "Term Loan")
+
+    def test_term_matches_business_term_loan_only(self):
+        term = _product("Business Term Loan", "Conventional")
+        sba = _product("SBA 7(a) Standard", "SBA")
+        matches, _ = product_matches_application_loan_type(term, "term", "")
+        self.assertTrue(matches)
+        self.assertFalse(product_matches_application_loan_type(sba, "term", "")[0])
+
+    def test_term_still_matches_when_cre_collateral_present(self):
+        term = _product("Business Term Loan", "Conventional")
+        cre = _product("Commercial Real Estate Loan", "Real Estate")
+        self.assertTrue(product_matches_application_loan_type(term, "term", "", has_cre_deal=True)[0])
+        self.assertFalse(product_matches_application_loan_type(cre, "term", "", has_cre_deal=True)[0])
+        self.assertTrue(
+            product_matches_application_loan_type(cre, "commercial real estate", "refinance", has_cre_deal=True)[0]
+        )
+        self.assertFalse(
+            product_matches_application_loan_type(_product("SBA 7(a) Standard", "SBA"), "term", "", has_cre_deal=True)[0]
+        )
+
+    def test_cre_deal_matches_real_estate_product(self):
+        cre = _product("Commercial Real Estate Loan", "Real Estate")
+        matches, reason = product_matches_application_loan_type(
+            cre, "commercial real estate", "Refinance", has_cre_deal=True
+        )
+        self.assertTrue(matches)
+        self.assertIn("CRE", reason)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_oak_hill_qualification.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_oak_hill_qualification.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e73f225
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_oak_hill_qualification.py
@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@
+"""Oak Hill qualification engine — term application + CRE document facts."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+from types import SimpleNamespace
+
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.context import QualificationContext
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.engine import run_qualification_engine
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.facts import resolve_construction_budget
+from agent.services.loanproducts.models import LoanProductCriteria
+
+
+def _minimal_product(name: str, category: str) -> SimpleNamespace:
+    return SimpleNamespace(
+        id=f"id-{name}",
+        name=name,
+        category=category,
+        min_amount=25_000,
+        max_amount=5_000_000,
+        typical_rate_range=SimpleNamespace(min=7.0, max=12.0),
+        typical_term_months=SimpleNamespace(min=12, max=60),
+        criteria=LoanProductCriteria(
+            min_credit_score=650,
+            min_dscr=1.15,
+            min_years_in_business=1.0,
+            min_annual_revenue=150_000,
+            collateral_required=False,
+        ),
+    )
+
+
+class TestOakHillQualificationEngine(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_construction_budget_is_spent_plus_remaining(self):
+        facts = {"spent_to_date": 183_750.0, "remaining_budget": 107_000.0}
+        self.assertEqual(resolve_construction_budget(facts), 290_750.0)
+
+    def test_oak_hill_term_app_filters_non_matching_products(self):
+        facts = {
+            "as_is_value": 1_850_000,
+            "as_complete_value": 2_050_000,
+            "remaining_budget": 107_000,
+            "remaining_budget_appraisal": 155_000,
+            "spent_to_date": 183_750,
+            "building_sf": 17_000,
+            "physical_occupancy": 1.0,
+            "economic_occupancy": 1.0,
+            "gross_potential_rent": 176_460.0,
+            "property_state": "MA",
+            "projected_stabilization": "May 2026",
+        }
+        products = [
+            _minimal_product("Business Term Loan", "Conventional"),
+            _minimal_product("SBA 7(a) Standard", "SBA"),
+            _minimal_product("Commercial Real Estate Loan", "Real Estate"),
+        ]
+        ctx = QualificationContext(
+            application_id="6a4216051a9867ee9df30efc",
+            user_id="user-oh",
+            lender_id="lender-oh",
+            loan_amount=80_000,
+            loan_type="term",
+            loan_purpose="Buy new House",
+            business={"name": "GK Infosec", "state": "MA", "yearEstablished": 2020},
+            owner={},
+            financials={},
+            document_ids=["d1", "d2"],
+            facts=facts,
+            loan_products=products,
+            live_mode=False,
+        )
+        result = run_qualification_engine(ctx)
+        names = {p.product_name for p in result.product_fit}
+        self.assertIn("Business Term Loan", names)
+        self.assertNotIn("Commercial Real Estate Loan", names)
+        self.assertNotIn("SBA 7(a) Standard", names)
+        self.assertNotEqual(result.overall.decision, "proceed")
+        self.assertTrue(result.deal_warnings)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_qualification_recommendation.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_qualification_recommendation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..478105e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_qualification_recommendation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,52 @@
+"""Unit tests for deal-score recommendation bands."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.recommendation import resolve_recommendation
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.schemas import OverallQualificationSchema
+
+
+class TestRecommendationBands(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_strong_proceed_at_80(self) -> None:
+        rec = resolve_recommendation(deal_score=82.5, deal_score_available=True)
+        self.assertEqual(rec.band, "strong_proceed")
+        self.assertEqual(rec.label, "Strong Proceed")
+        self.assertEqual(rec.color, "#047857")
+
+    def test_proceed_band(self) -> None:
+        rec = resolve_recommendation(deal_score=72.0, deal_score_available=True)
+        self.assertEqual(rec.band, "proceed")
+        self.assertEqual(rec.label, "Proceed")
+
+    def test_manual_uw_band(self) -> None:
+        rec = resolve_recommendation(deal_score=55.0, deal_score_available=True)
+        self.assertEqual(rec.band, "manual_uw")
+        self.assertEqual(rec.label, "Manual UW")
+
+    def test_review_band(self) -> None:
+        rec = resolve_recommendation(deal_score=35.0, deal_score_available=True)
+        self.assertEqual(rec.band, "review")
+        self.assertEqual(rec.label, "Review Required")
+        self.assertEqual(rec.color, "#eab308")
+
+    def test_insufficient_when_score_unavailable(self) -> None:
+        rec = resolve_recommendation(deal_score=None, deal_score_available=False)
+        self.assertEqual(rec.band, "insufficient_data")
+
+    def test_schema_backfills_from_cached_payload_without_recommendation(self) -> None:
+        overall = OverallQualificationSchema.model_validate(
+            {
+                "deal_score": 75.0,
+                "deal_score_available": True,
+                "confidence_score": 80.0,
+                "decision": "proceed",
+            }
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(overall.recommendation_band, "proceed")
+        self.assertEqual(overall.recommendation_label, "Proceed")
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_required_docs.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_required_docs.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..433d31f
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_required_docs.py
@@ -0,0 +1,69 @@
+"""Tests for required document satisfaction logic."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.context import DocumentMeta, QualificationContext
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.engine import run_qualification_engine
+from agent.services.cre_qualification.required_docs import (
+    collect_uploaded_document_types,
+    missing_required_documents,
+    normalize_document_type,
+)
+
+
+class TestRequiredDocuments(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_normalize_enum_style_type(self):
+        self.assertEqual(normalize_document_type("DocumentType.property_appraisal"), "property_appraisal")
+
+    def test_rehab_budget_satisfies_construction_budget(self):
+        missing = missing_required_documents(
+            "Construction Loan",
+            "Ground up",
+            {"rehab_budget", "property_appraisal"},
+        )
+        self.assertNotIn("construction_budget", missing)
+
+    def test_facts_satisfy_appraisal_without_doc_type(self):
+        missing = missing_required_documents(
+            "Construction",
+            "",
+            set(),
+            facts={"as_is_value": 1_700_000},
+        )
+        self.assertNotIn("property_appraisal", missing)
+
+    def test_facts_satisfy_pfs_and_credit(self):
+        facts = {
+            "total_assets": 14_000_000,
+            "net_worth": 7_000_000,
+            "primary_fico_score": 665,
+        }
+        missing = missing_required_documents("Construction", "", set(), facts=facts)
+        self.assertNotIn("personal_financial_statement", missing)
+        self.assertNotIn("credit_report", missing)
+
+    def test_project_score_not_inflated_without_budget(self):
+        ctx = QualificationContext(
+            application_id="proj-test",
+            user_id="u1",
+            lender_id="l1",
+            loan_amount=1_000_000,
+            loan_type="Construction",
+            loan_purpose="Rehab",
+            business={"name": "Builder LLC", "yearEstablished": 2010},
+            owner={},
+            financials={},
+            documents=[],
+            facts={"projected_stabilization": "May 2026", "as_is_value": 2_000_000},
+            live_mode=False,
+        )
+        result = run_qualification_engine(ctx)
+        project = next(h for h in result.intelligence_heads if h.id == "project")
+        self.assertIsNone(project.score)
+        self.assertIn(project.status, ("insufficient_data", "partial"))
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
